data.name: Corruption Brothel
data.detailed_description:
You were nobody, a tavern keeper with watered-down mead and a gambling debt that could choke a horse. Then an evil lord burned your establishment to cinders over seventeen silver coins. They laughed while you watched everything turn to ash.

Now you've clawed your way back with a dagger in one hand and a ledger in the other. That crumbling tavern on the outskirts? It's yours again. But you're not serving drinks anymore. You're serving revenge, one dead lord at a time.

In Corruption Brothel, you orchestrate the downfall of the noble houses that rule this fetid kingdom. Poison their wine. Slit their throats in silk-sheeted beds. Bribe their guards. Blackmail their wives. And when the patriarch lies cold?

Collect the daughters left behind.

These sheltered highborn girls have never worked a day in their perfumed lives. You'll change that. Break their pride or seduce their loyalty, turn ladies into whores, princesses into profit. Staff your growing brothel with the bloodline of every bastard who wronged you.

Manage your establishment. Corrupt your workers. Expand your empire from a single squalid room into a pleasure palace that makes kings kneel.

The throne isn't your goal.

Owning everyone who sits on it is.

Gameplay Features

  • Strategic assassination sandbox — Plan and execute the murder of rival lords through multiple approaches: poison, steel, seduction, or orchestrated "accidents." Each target requires gathering intelligence, exploiting weaknesses, and choosing your moment.

  • Brothel management simulation — Renovate rooms, set prices, hire staff, and manage your growing roster of workers. Balance reputation against discretion as influential clients demand increasingly specific services.

  • Deep corruption mechanics — Every character has a will to break and desires to exploit. Use manipulation, kindness, debt, or degradation to reshape highborn daughters into willing participants. Multiple corruption paths yield different specializations and loyalty outcomes.

  • Dynamic reputation system — Your actions ripple through the kingdom. Become known as a shadowy kingmaker, a brutal crime lord, or a beloved establishment owner. Reputation unlocks different assassination contracts, clientele, and story branches.

  • Procedurally generated targets — Noble houses regenerate with new heirs, relationships, and vulnerabilities. No two playthroughs dismantle the aristocracy the same way.

  • Relationship and rivalry networks — Characters remember. The girl you corrupted might become your most loyal earner—or sell your secrets to your next target's allies.

  • Fully animated intimate scenes — Witness the fruits of your corruption through detailed, physics-driven encounters reflecting each character's transformation.

Features

  • Strategic assassination sandbox

  • Brothel management simulation

  • Deep corruption mechanics

  • Dynamic reputation system

  • Procedurally generated targets

  • Relationship and rivalry networks

  • Fully animated intimate scenes

data.short_description: They burned your tavern over a handful of silver. Now you're burning their bloodlines to ash. Assassinate nobles. Collect their daughters. Build a brothel empire from aristocratic ruin. Every lord who laughed will kneel, or die in silk sheets.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Microsoft Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 20 GB 可用空間
